versions.label: LSB
versions.text: "for all have sinned and fall short of the glory of God,"

context_lines: Romans 3:23 should be read within the flow of its chapter and the larger argument of Romans.
common_interpretation_lines: Every person stands in that sentence. The problem is not that some people need a little improvement while others need a lot. The problem is sin, and all have sinned.
Sin earns death. Eternal life is not earned at all. It is given. That is why the gospel is good news and not advice.
